name: Abhilasha Sharma
bio: Advocate Abhilasha Sharma is a legal professional with over five years of experience in handling matters before tribunals, debt/banking disputes, and consumer forums, specializing in insurance disputes and claim rejections.

name: Abhishek Jaswal
bio: Litigation advocate handling complex bank and NBFC disputes, SARFAESI notices, debt recovery tribunal (DRT) cases, corporate legal strategy, compliance, and legal drafting.

name: Devansh Agarwal
bio: Financial advisory specialist at Credit Curators. Guides individuals and corporates in loan settlement, One-Time Settlement (OTS) negotiations, and resolving financial distress caused by loan mis-selling.

name: Gaurav Gangwani
bio: With over 11 years of experience in non-motor insurance claims, Gaurav Gangwani specializes in fire, marine, engineering, and workmen compensation claims.

name: Milind Dole
bio: Insurance ombudsman specialist with 30 years exclusively in non-life insurance claims. Has adjudicated motor, health, fire, marine, and commercial insurance claims disputes.

name: Ritank Kumar
bio: Delhi-based advocate focused exclusively on insurance claim conflicts, claim recovery, civil litigation, and consumer court cases against insurers.
